Petition For Waiver Of Appraisal By Probate Referre And Statement Of Good Cause
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Suzanne McDonnell for Eva Levi (Petitioner).

The Court informed Ms. McDonnell that it was the Court's policy to always require an appraisal by a probate referee as it is not clear that the same calculations are used by all appraisers. The matter was denied. Ms. McDonnell to submit the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
